proposals.title: UP_TRI × Bear: n=96, 94.7% WR, Tier M → boost candidate (TAKE_SMALL)

claim.what: Promote boost_pattern: signal=UP_TRI, regime=Bear (Tier B / TAKE_SMALL)
claim.expected_effect: Surface as Tier-B boost on cohort matches; observed +37.2pp edge over per-signal baseline

evidence: Wilson 95% lower bound 0.8815 well above Tier M floor — sample size adequate
R-multiple 0.61 below Tier S threshold (1.0); promotion is to Tier M (B/TAKE_SMALL) only, not Tier S (A/TAKE_FULL)
risks: Cohort tier may drift on next archive comparison; demotion auto-fires per §3
R-multiple distribution under D-8 review (Day-6 forced-exit dominance per project_anchor §7 D-8)
approval would propagate overlap to mini_scanner_rules.json

proposed_rule_entry.reason: brain_step4: cohort Tier M, n=96, wr=94.7%, edge +37.2pp

decision_metadata.llm_enrichment_rationale: Step 4 tier classification remains robust (n=96, Wilson lower 0.8815, +37.2pp edge over UP_TRI baseline) with promotion correctly capped at Tier M/TAKE_SMALL given R-multiple 0.61. Cohort is regime-gated to Bear while current regime is Choppy (stable, 7 days) with 100% Choppy exposure across 67 open positions, so activation is deferred and existing concentration is not compounded. Consistent with continuous prior approvals of this exact cohort (2026-04-29 through 2026-06-03) and no trader rejection on record.

proposals.title: Exposure concentration: by_regime + by_signal_type×sector = Choppy regime (100%) + UP_TRI×Choppy×Bank cell (23.88%) + UP_TRI signal dominance (97%) (100.0%)

claim.what: Concentration risk: by_regime + by_signal_type×sector = Choppy regime (100%) + UP_TRI×Choppy×Bank cell (23.88%) + UP_TRI signal dominance (97%); recommended action: Pause new entries in signal_type=UP_TRI×sector=Bank until Bank share drops below 20% via natural Day-6 exits; additionally throttle new UP_TRI entries in IT and Infra to prevent secondary cells from breaching threshold. Consider hedging book-level long exposure with a Bank-sector or NIFTY index short until Choppy×UP_TRI cohort matures from Candidate to Tier M.
claim.expected_effect: Trader awareness of tail risk: A Choppy→Bear regime flip would simultaneously unwind the entire 67-position long book with no statistical edge justification, with disproportionate damage concentrated in Bank (16 positions), IT (11) and Infra (7) — 34/67 = 51% of the book sits in three sector clusters within an unvalidated cohort.

evidence: regime_concentration triggered: Choppy observed=1.0 vs threshold=0.80
UP_TRI×Choppy×Bank cell at 0.2388 share (16/67), above 0.20 cell threshold
UP_TRI×Choppy×IT cell at 0.1642 share (11/67), approaching threshold
UP_TRI×Choppy×Infra cell at 0.1045 share (7/67), third concentration cluster
UP_TRI signal share 65/67 = 97% — above 0.85 signal dominance threshold
All matched cohorts only Candidate tier (Choppy×UP_TRI n=160) — unvalidated edge
risks: Recommendation may be over-cautious; concentration may be edge-validated
Trader may already be aware; informational only

proposals.reversibility: Informational warning; no system mutation. Suppresses on next run if concentration drops below threshold.

decision_metadata.concentration_value: Choppy regime (100%) + UP_TRI×Choppy×Bank cell (23.88%) + UP_TRI signal dominance (97%)
decision_metadata.recommended_action: Pause new entries in signal_type=UP_TRI×sector=Bank until Bank share drops below 20% via natural Day-6 exits; additionally throttle new UP_TRI entries in IT and Infra to prevent secondary cells from breaching threshold. Consider hedging book-level long exposure with a Bank-sector or NIFTY index short until Choppy×UP_TRI cohort matures from Candidate to Tier M.
decision_metadata.tail_risk_scenario: A Choppy→Bear regime flip would simultaneously unwind the entire 67-position long book with no statistical edge justification, with disproportionate damage concentrated in Bank (16 positions), IT (11) and Infra (7) — 34/67 = 51% of the book sits in three sector clusters within an unvalidated cohort.
decision_metadata.llm_rationale: Portfolio is 100% Choppy regime (above 0.80 threshold) AND UP_TRI×Choppy×Bank cell breaches the 0.20 cell threshold at 23.88%. UP_TRI also dominates signal mix at 65/67 = 97% (above 0.85 threshold) with the book fully directional long. Matched Choppy×UP_TRI cohort sits only at Candidate tier (n=160) — unvalidated edge across all concentration cells.
